TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-kathethel2_kalaeh a oemaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kakhayza'an yao e hayza' koSa'en ka noka tatini' ka kapanabih koSa ka kathethel kathethel kakhayza'an koSa'en kama 'ima raam tnon ka kaybaeen raam sihoe.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan jao ə hajz~ðaʔ koʃaʔən ka noka tatiniʔ ka kapanaβih koʃa ka kathəthəl kathəthəl kakhajz~ðaʔan koʃaʔən kama ʔima raam tnon ka kajβæən raam s~θihœ.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an yao e hayza' koSa'en ka noka tatini' ka kapanabih koSa ka kathethel kathethel kakhayza'an koSa'en kama 'ima raam tnon ka kaybaeen raam sihoe.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan jao ə hajz~ðaʔ koʃaʔən ka noka tatiniʔ ka kapanaβih koʃa ka kathəthəl kathəthəl kakhajz~ðaʔan koʃaʔən kama ʔima raam tnon ka kajβæən raam s~θihœ.
S.TRANSL: 以前我有聽說老人的故事說,雷女是以前很會織布,會製線.
I was told the story by the edlers. It said that long time before, Kathethel was the one who knew very well how to weave and embroider.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an nak'ino komoSa' makaksekela' ki SaiSiyat.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan nakʔino komoʃaʔ makaks~θəkəlaʔ ki ʃaiʃijat.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an nak'ino komoSa' makaksekela' ki SaiSiyat.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan nakʔino komoʃaʔ makaks~θəkəlaʔ ki ʃaiʃijat.
S.TRANSL: 以前如何和賽夏族相識.
How she met the SaiSiyat people.

S.FORM: kakhayza'an SaiSiyat oma' rengreng rima' 'alep ray 'oeS'oeSo'an.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan ʃaiʃijat omaʔ rəŋrəŋ rimaʔ ʔaləp raj ʔœʃʔœʃoʔan.
S.FORM: kakhayza'an SaiSiyat oma' rengreng rima' 'alep ray 'oeS'oeSo'an.
S.PHON: kakhajz~ðaʔan ʃaiʃijat omaʔ rəŋrəŋ rimaʔ ʔaləp raj ʔœʃʔœʃoʔan.
S.TRANSL: 以前賽夏人常常去野外打獵.
Before, SaiSiyat people often went hunting in the fields.

S.FORM: ta hayza' 'aehae' 'oSa'an rima' 'alep.
S.PHON: ta hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔoʃaʔan rimaʔ ʔaləp.
S.FORM: ta hayza' 'aehae' 'oSa'an rima' 'alep.
S.PHON: ta hajz~ðaʔ ʔæhæʔ ʔoʃaʔan rimaʔ ʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 有一個地方,去打獵.
There was a place where they went hunting.

S.FORM: rima' lasia ray bala' 'al'alihan mas'inasal risaa'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia raj βalaʔ ʔalʔalihan mas~θʔinas~θal ris~θaaʔ.
S.FORM: rima' lasia ray bala' 'al'alihan mas'inasal risaa'.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia raj βalaʔ ʔalʔalihan mas~θʔinas~θal ris~θaaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們去河流附近搭工寮.
They put up a temporary shelter near the river.

S.FORM: ra babaaw ray sinsekel rima' ma 'alep 'isaa.
S.PHON: ra βaβaaw raj s~θins~θəkəl rimaʔ ma ʔaləp ʔis~θaa.
S.FORM: ra babaaw ray sinsekel rima' ma 'alep 'isaa.
S.PHON: ra βaβaaw raj s~θins~θəkəl rimaʔ ma ʔaləp ʔis~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 他們剛剛去打獵沒多久.
When they started to go hunting,

S.FORM: lasia rima' ila 'alep patinasal ray bala' langi.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ ila ʔaləp patinas~θal raj βalaʔ laŋi.
S.FORM: lasia rima' ila 'alep patinasal ray bala' langi.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ ila ʔaləp patinas~θal raj βalaʔ laŋi.
S.TRANSL: 他們去打獵,工寮搭在河邊.
They went hunting and put up a temporary shelter by the river bank.

S.FORM: lasia ma' isaa rima' ila 'alep lobih.
S.PHON: las~θia maʔ is~θaa rimaʔ ila ʔaləp loβih.
S.FORM: lasia ma' isaa rima' ila 'alep lobih.
S.PHON: las~θia maʔ is~θaa rimaʔ ila ʔaləp loβih.
S.TRANSL: 他們去打獵回來.
They went back from hunting.

S.FORM: lobih hini kita'en ray hataS nasia sa'sa'ih ka koloban hiza 'aSkan ray katalekan lobihin ma' ana pazay ma' ma' 'aS'aSay ila saboeh talek ila saboeh.
S.PHON: loβih hini kitaʔən raj hataʃ nas~θia s~θaʔs~θaʔih ka koloβan hiz~ða ʔaʃkan raj kataləkan loβihin maʔ ana paz~ðaj maʔ maʔ ʔaʃʔaʃaj ila s~θaβœh talək ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: lobih hini kita'en ray hataS nasia sa'sa'ih ka koloban hiza 'aSkan ray katalekan lobihin ma' ana pazay ma' ma' 'aS'aSay ila saboeh talek ila saboeh.
S.PHON: loβih hini kitaʔən raj hataʃ nas~θia s~θaʔs~θaʔih ka koloβan hiz~ða ʔaʃkan raj kataləkan loβihin maʔ ana paz~ðaj maʔ maʔ ʔaʃʔaʃaj ila s~θaβœh talək ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 回來看到他們的工寮,每一個廚房裡的鍋子,回來飯都全部煮好了.
They returned and found each container in the kitchen was filled with cooked rice.

S.FORM: lasia lobih kSa 'ampowa' hini' hayza' ka mae'iyaeh hiya' hini mwai' talek ka pazay 'inimita'.
S.PHON: las~θia loβih kʃa ʔampowaʔ hiniʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka mæʔijæh hijaʔ hini mwaiʔ talək ka paz~ðaj ʔinimitaʔ.
S.FORM: lasia lobih kSa 'ampowa' hini' hayza' ka mae'iyaeh hiya' hini mwai' talek ka pazay 'inimita'.
S.PHON: las~θia loβih kʃa ʔampowaʔ hiniʔ hajz~ðaʔ ka mæʔijæh hijaʔ hini mwaiʔ talək ka paz~ðaj ʔinimitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們回來,說:「怎麼會有人常常來給我們煮飯.」
When they got back, they asked, who always came to cook for us?

S.FORM: rima' lasia 'aSmi'ael ka hiza ka pazay talek makaktikot.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia ʔaʃmiʔæl ka hiz~ða ka paz~ðaj talək makaktikot.
S.FORM: rima' lasia 'aSmi'ael ka hiza ka pazay talek makaktikot.
S.PHON: rimaʔ las~θia ʔaʃmiʔæl ka hiz~ða ka paz~ðaj talək makaktikot.
S.TRANSL: 他們正要吃飯的時候,大家心裡都怕怕的.
They were about to eat, but they felt uneasy.

S.FORM: koSa 'ima pasan'a'aih hiza hilasia ka kama'alep.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔima pas~θanʔaʔaih hiz~ða hilas~θia ka kamaʔaləp.
S.FORM: koSa 'ima pasan'a'aih hiza hilasia ka kama'alep.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔima pas~θanʔaʔaih hiz~ða hilas~θia ka kamaʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 就說也許有人想要陷害我們.
They said maybe somebody wanted to set them up.

S.FORM: na nasia pazay mari'in siboeloe sipasi'ael ka 'aehoe' noka 'aehoe' si'aelen kayzaeh 'okay pasay 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: na nas~θia paz~ðaj mariʔin s~θiβœlœ s~θipas~θiʔæl ka ʔæhœʔ noka ʔæhœʔ s~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh ʔokaj pas~θaj ʔæhœʔ.
S.FORM: na nasia pazay mari'in siboeloe sipasi'ael ka 'aehoe' noka 'aehoe' si'aelen kayzaeh 'okay pasay 'aehoe'.
S.PHON: na nas~θia paz~ðaj mariʔin s~θiβœlœ s~θipas~θiʔæl ka ʔæhœʔ noka ʔæhœʔ s~θiʔælən kajz~ðæh ʔokaj pas~θaj ʔæhœʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們把飯拿起來扔掉,給狗吃了,好好的沒有死掉.
They tossed the rice for the dog to eat it. The dog happily ate the rice and did not die.

S.FORM: m'itol 'aehae' hahila.
S.PHON: mʔitol ʔæhæʔ hahila.
S.FORM: m'itol 'aehae' hahila.
S.PHON: mʔitol ʔæhæʔ hahila.
S.TRANSL: 第二天,
On the next day,

S.FORM: lasia rima' naehaen 'alep.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ næhæn ʔaləp.
S.FORM: lasia rima' naehaen 'alep.
S.PHON: las~θia rimaʔ næhæn ʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 他們又去打獵.
They went hunting again.

S.FORM: komoSa a lobihin kita'en ma' noka ina 'alep ka pazay ma' nak'isaa kita'en 'al'alroor talek ila saboeh.
S.PHON: komoʃa a loβihin kitaʔən maʔ noka ina ʔaləp ka paz~ðaj maʔ nakʔis~θaa kitaʔən ʔalʔalroor talək ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: komoSa a lobihin kita'en ma' noka ina 'alep ka pazay ma' nak'isaa kita'en 'al'alroor talek ila saboeh.
S.PHON: komoʃa a loβihin kitaʔən maʔ noka ina ʔaləp ka paz~ðaj maʔ nakʔis~θaa kitaʔən ʔalʔalroor talək ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 那些打獵過的人回來看到飯全部都煮好了.」
When they went back in the evening, the rice was again already prepared.

S.FORM: koSa 'ima nak'ino'an ma' hiya' 'atomalan hini ma talek 'inimita' ka pazay.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔima nakʔinoʔan maʔ hijaʔ ʔatomalan hini ma talək ʔinimitaʔ ka paz~ðaj.
S.FORM: koSa 'ima nak'ino'an ma' hiya' 'atomalan hini ma talek 'inimita' ka pazay.
S.PHON: koʃa ʔima nakʔinoʔan maʔ hijaʔ ʔatomalan hini ma talək ʔinimitaʔ ka paz~ðaj.
S.TRANSL: 就說:「怎麼到底是誰一直來為我們煮飯?」
They asked, 'Who went out of his way to come to cook for us?'

S.FORM: lasia ma'az'azem komoSa ma takahini ila Saroo' ila So 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh rini ma kitkita o hosail i takosaili 'izi'i pakita'.
S.PHON: las~θia maʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm komoʃa ma takahini ila ʃarooʔ ila ʃo ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh rini ma kitkita o hos~θail i takos~θaili ʔiz~ðiʔi pakitaʔ.
S.FORM: lasia ma'az'azem komoSa ma takahini ila Saroo' ila So 'aehae' ka mae'iyaeh rini ma kitkita o hosail i takosaili 'izi'i pakita'.
S.PHON: las~θia maʔaz~ðʔaz~ðəm komoʃa ma takahini ila ʃarooʔ ila ʃo ʔæhæʔ ka mæʔijæh rini ma kitkita o hos~θail i takos~θaili ʔiz~ðiʔi pakitaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們心裡想:「就這樣吧.輪流一個人監視,要躲好,不要被他發現.」
Let's do something like this: we take turns staying here to hide and observe. Don't let that person see us."

S.FORM: sa'oewaz lasia 'aehae' ka kamo'alay saro'on ri'za ray ataS ra si'oSa' ila Sa 'alep.
S.PHON: s~θaʔœwaz~ð las~θia ʔæhæʔ ka kamoʔalaj s~θaroʔon riʔz~ða raj ataʃ ra s~θiʔoʃaʔ ila ʃa ʔaləp.
S.FORM: sa'oewaz lasia 'aehae' ka kamo'alay saro'on ri'za ray ataS ra si'oSa' ila Sa 'alep.
S.PHON: s~θaʔœwaz~ð las~θia ʔæhæʔ ka kamoʔalaj s~θaroʔon riʔz~ða raj ataʃ ra s~θiʔoʃaʔ ila ʃa ʔaləp.
S.TRANSL: 真的一個年輕人躲在工寮後面,他們就去打獵.
A young man stayed behind, and the rest of them went to hunt.

S.FORM: isa mwai' potngor roehaenaen ila.
S.PHON: is~θa mwaiʔ potŋor rœhænæn ila.
S.FORM: isa mwai' potngor roehaenaen ila.
S.PHON: is~θa mwaiʔ potŋor rœhænæn ila.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上就來了.
It came the evening.

S.FORM: ray katikinSao'on sa'oewaz kita'en 'inay hao mwai' sipaykakamoeh ka kabinao' 'inaray wasal 'izo' ma.
S.PHON: raj katikinʃaoʔon s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitaʔən ʔinaj hao mwaiʔ s~θipajkakamœh ka kaβinaoʔ ʔinaraj was~θal ʔiz~ðoʔ ma.
S.FORM: ray katikinSao'on sa'oewaz kita'en 'inay hao mwai' sipaykakamoeh ka kabinao' 'inaray wasal 'izo' ma.
S.PHON: raj katikinʃaoʔon s~θaʔœwaz~ð kitaʔən ʔinaj hao mwaiʔ s~θipajkakamœh ka kaβinaoʔ ʔinaraj was~θal ʔiz~ðoʔ ma.
S.TRANSL: 晚餐的時間真的從那裡看到有個小姐匆匆忙忙從海裡出來了.
When the time came to prepare supper, a lady suddenly appeared from the sea.

S.FORM: mwai' 'isaza noka kamo'alay kitkita' tanisia.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔis~θaz~ða noka kamoʔalaj kitkitaʔ tanis~θia.
S.FORM: mwai' 'isaza noka kamo'alay kitkita' tanisia.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ ʔis~θaz~ða noka kamoʔalaj kitkitaʔ tanis~θia.
S.TRANSL: 被那個年輕人監視跟蹤.
She was being observed by the young man.

S.FORM: mwai' wohwohwoh ma talek ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ wohwohwoh ma talək ila ka paz~ðaj.
S.FORM: mwai' wohwohwoh ma talek ila ka pazay.
S.PHON: mwaiʔ wohwohwoh ma talək ila ka paz~ðaj.
S.TRANSL: 嘩嘩嘩的洗米,煮起飯來了.
She washed the rice, and cooked it.

S.FORM: pazay yo nisia 'okik raami ka 'am sempong.
S.PHON: paz~ðaj jo nis~θia ʔokik raami ka ʔam s~θəmpoŋ.
S.FORM: pazay yo nisia 'okik raami ka 'am sempong.
S.PHON: paz~ðaj jo nis~θia ʔokik raami ka ʔam s~θəmpoŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他不知道米要用什麼量.
She didn't know what to use for measuring the rice.

S.FORM: lasia saspong ka kano' noka kaeh'oe' ka pehez sa 'ol'ola'an 'atomal si'siya'an ka kaklekeh kin sobaeoeh.
S.PHON: las~θia s~θas~θpoŋ ka kanoʔ noka kæhʔœʔ ka pəhəz~ð s~θa ʔolʔolaʔan ʔatomal s~θiʔs~θijaʔan ka kakləkəh kin s~θoβæœh.
S.FORM: lasia saspong ka kano' noka kaeh'oe' ka pehez sa 'ol'ola'an 'atomal si'siya'an ka kaklekeh kin sobaeoeh.
S.PHON: las~θia s~θas~θpoŋ ka kanoʔ noka kæhʔœʔ ka pəhəz~ð s~θa ʔolʔolaʔan ʔatomal s~θiʔs~θijaʔan ka kakləkəh kin s~θoβæœh.
S.TRANSL: 他們量米的器具是樹的果實殼,像指甲那麼小.
The fruit that they used to measure rice was as small as a fingernail.

S.FORM: hiza sispeng za hiza ka SaiSiyat koSa na 'inimita' si'si' haysia o hini pazay o kin 'akoy talek.
S.PHON: hiz~ða s~θis~θpəŋ z~ða hiz~ða ka ʃaiʃijat koʃa na ʔinimitaʔ s~θiʔs~θiʔ hajs~θia o hini paz~ðaj o kin ʔakoj talək.
S.FORM: hiza sispeng za hiza ka SaiSiyat koSa na 'inimita' si'si' haysia o hini pazay o kin 'akoy talek.
S.PHON: hiz~ða s~θis~θpəŋ z~ða hiz~ða ka ʃaiʃijat koʃa na ʔinimitaʔ s~θiʔs~θiʔ hajs~θia o hini paz~ðaj o kin ʔakoj talək.
S.TRANSL: 量米的時候賽夏人說,我們的飯煮起來還是很多.
She cooked too much rice, but it didn't seem like rice had been taken.

S.FORM: ampowa' ma 'ima kano 'atomal soka' isahiza kita'en noka hiza ka 'ima mia'lawa' zi'saa pakitkita' bowa tatini' zi'sa ka kamo'alay.
S.PHON: ampowaʔ ma ʔima kano ʔatomal s~θokaʔ is~θahiz~ða kitaʔən noka hiz~ða ka ʔima miaʔlawaʔ z~ðiʔs~θaa pakitkitaʔ βowa tatiniʔ z~ðiʔs~θa ka kamoʔalaj.
S.FORM: ampowa' ma 'ima kano 'atomal soka' isahiza kita'en noka hiza ka 'ima mia'lawa' zi'saa pakitkita' bowa tatini' zi'sa ka kamo'alay.
S.PHON: ampowaʔ ma ʔima kano ʔatomal s~θokaʔ is~θahiz~ða kitaʔən noka hiz~ða ka ʔima miaʔlawaʔ z~ðiʔs~θaa pakitkitaʔ βowa tatiniʔ z~ðiʔs~θa ka kamoʔalaj.
S.TRANSL: 不知道為什麼,被老人們派去站崗監視的是一個年輕人.
It is not known for what reason ... who was sent by the old man to guard the house."

S.FORM: hiza kita'en sia sa'oewaz mwai' talek ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða kitaʔən s~θia s~θaʔœwaz~ð mwaiʔ talək ila.
S.FORM: hiza kita'en sia sa'oewaz mwai' talek ila.
S.PHON: hiz~ða kitaʔən s~θia s~θaʔœwaz~ð mwaiʔ talək ila.
S.TRANSL: 就被年輕人看到她真的來煮飯了.
The young person has truly seen her come to cook.

S.FORM: a rima' nisia tikakamehen 'am talek ri'saa.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ nis~θia tikakaməhən ʔam talək riʔs~θaa.
S.FORM: a rima' nisia tikakamehen 'am talek ri'saa.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ nis~θia tikakaməhən ʔam talək riʔs~θaa.
S.TRANSL: 在那裡偷偷的看她煮飯.
The young man was watching her silently.

S.FORM: koSa'en hini So'o ay kama mwai' talek ila hini.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən hini ʃoʔo aj kama mwaiʔ talək ila hini.
S.FORM: koSa'en hini So'o ay kama mwai' talek ila hini.
S.PHON: koʃaʔən hini ʃoʔo aj kama mwaiʔ talək ila hini.
S.TRANSL: 你總是來這裡煮飯.
It's you who always came to cook here.

S.FORM: za sia 'okay tiskolater o pa'yakai'.
S.PHON: z~ða s~θia ʔokaj tis~θkolatər o paʔjakaiʔ.
S.FORM: za sia 'okay tiskolater o pa'yakai'.
S.PHON: z~ða s~θia ʔokaj tis~θkolatər o paʔjakaiʔ.
S.TRANSL: 她沒有回答也沒說什麼.
She neither answers nor says anything.

S.FORM: kayzaeh ka kabinao' isaa koSa'en tikakameehen noka isaa kamo'alay.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh ka kaβinaoʔ is~θaa koʃaʔən tikakaməəhən noka is~θaa kamoʔalaj.
S.FORM: kayzaeh ka kabinao' isaa koSa'en tikakameehen noka isaa kamo'alay.
S.PHON: kajz~ðæh ka kaβinaoʔ is~θaa koʃaʔən tikakaməəhən noka is~θaa kamoʔalaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個年輕人靜靜的看著那個小姐.
The young man observed the girl silently.

S.FORM: yo kita' ka isaa kamo'alay lasia.
S.PHON: jo kitaʔ ka is~θaa kamoʔalaj las~θia.
S.FORM: yo kita' ka isaa kamo'alay lasia.
S.PHON: jo kitaʔ ka is~θaa kamoʔalaj las~θia.
S.TRANSL: 小姐也看著年輕人.
The girl saw the youth.

S.FORM: sasazeez lasia roSa'.
S.PHON: s~θas~θaz~ðəəz~ð las~θia roʃaʔ.
S.FORM: sasazeez lasia roSa'.
S.PHON: s~θas~θaz~ðəəz~ð las~θia roʃaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個互相凝視.
Both of them stared at each other.
